questions.question: What is the absolute value of $-25$?
questions.explanation: Absolute value represents distance from zero. The absolute value of $-25$ is written as $|-25| = 25$.

questions.question: Evaluate the expression: $-|-12|$
questions.explanation: Compute absolute value first: $|-12| = 12$. Then apply the negative sign sitting outside the bars, resulting in $-12$.

questions.question: Which of the following comparison symbols makes the statement true? $|-9|$ ____ $|-10|$
questions.explanation: Evaluate terms first: $|-9| = 9$ and $|-10| = 10$. Since $9 < 10$, the statement is $|-9| < |-10|$.

questions.question: Calculate the value of: $|-5| \times |3|$
questions.explanation: First, evaluate the absolute values: $|-5| = 5$ and $|3| = 3$. Then multiply them: $5 \times 3 = 15$.

questions.question: The absolute value of any real number represents its:
options: Distance from zero on a number line
questions.explanation: By definition, the absolute value is a geometric measure of a number's distance from zero on the number line.
